---
name: New topic request
about: Suggest a topic to add to the knowledge base
title: "[topic] Phase X — <topic name>"
labels: ["topic-request"]
---

**Which phase?**
e.g. Phase 4 — System Design & Architecture

**Topic name**
e.g. CQRS (Command Query Responsibility Segregation)

**Why this topic?**
Common in senior interviews? Frequently misunderstood? Personal learning need?

**Key subtopics worth covering**
- …
- …

**References worth citing**
- Book / paper / article
